default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kick-off meeting to align on Biologica's content strategy and requirements for their upcoming supplement product launch.](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Biologica is launching a women's health supplement tailored to 3 hormonal stages: reproductive years, perimenopause, postmenopause](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Launch timeline: Inventory in August, website launch September 24th](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Goal: Produce 75-100 high-quality content pieces focused on building credibility and education, not just SEO](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [Key differentiators: Science-backed ingredients, personalized for hormonal stages, simplified regimen](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)

## Topics

### Product Overview

  - [Supplement drink mix in sachets, 30 per tin](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
  - [Formulated for 3 hormonal stages: reproductive years (18-40s), perimenopause, postmenopause](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
  - [Contains 2-5 branded, clinically-researched ingredients per formula](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
  - [Focuses on key issues like sleep, anxiety, nutrient needs for each stage](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
  - [Positioned as a "co-pilot" for hormonal health, not fixing something "wrong"](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)

### Brand Positioning

  - [Science-forward, focusing on clinically-proven ingredients](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=2760.0)
  - [Simplifying women's health information and supplementation](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=2764.0)
  - [Transparency on ingredient sourcing and quality](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=2603.0)
  - [Balancing multivitamin approach with targeted health outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=2994.0)
  - [Not trying to be the "shiny new ingredient" but reliable, researched support](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=2240.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Build a comprehensive knowledge hub on women's hormonal health](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)
  - [Focus on educating about hormonal stages and related health needs](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)
  - [Highlight clinical research behind ingredients and formulations](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)
  - [Address misconceptions about supplement regulation and efficacy](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=2776.0)
  - [Create content for 3 main personas aligned with hormonal stages](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)

### Medical Credibility

  - [3 OB/GYNs on medical advisory board for content creation/review](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [VP of Innovation is a naturopathic doctor, available for content](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Need streamlined process for medical review of content](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=2324.0)

### Competitor Landscape

  - [Key competitors: Bonafide (indication-focused), O Positive (PMS support)](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)
  - [Parallel (fertility-focused) doing okay in the space](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)
  - [Most women getting information from podcasts and Instagram influencers](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)

### Consumer Research

  - [Conducted video interviews with target consumers](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
  - [AI transcripts and summaries available, full videos can be shared](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [Key insight: Women find conflicting, confusing supplement information](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to follow up with detailed next steps within a day](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Biologica to share consumer research videos/transcripts](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
  - [GrowthX to process videos and create searchable knowledge base](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)
  - [Develop streamlined process for medical review of content](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=2324.0)
  - [GrowthX to expand competitor research based on new insights](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Schedule deep dive on FDA processes and ingredient research with Maggie (VP Innovation)](https://fathom.video/share/Cw-8aysm5zvsD8BqreyTWcs2BgAawaRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

action_items.description: Set up process to extract & have doctors review/sign off on medical info for content credibility
Provide access to research papers/articles used in product development to GrowthX team
Begin developing content strategy integrating approach to cut through supplement confusion for women
Follow up with next steps and requests after regrouping team's thoughts (within ~1 day)
Share full videos of consumer research interviews with GrowthX team
